hero.title: Communication over untrusted networks
hero.subtitle: Post-quantum, end-to-end encrypted, peer-to-peer messaging built in Go.
features.title: Built for the future
features.subtitle: Security properties designed to protect against both current and emerging threats.
features.postQuantum.title: Post-Quantum Resistant
features.postQuantum.desc: ML-KEM-768 key exchange protects your communications against future quantum computer attacks.
features.e2e.title: End-to-End Encrypted
features.e2e.desc: Every message is encrypted with ChaCha20-Poly1305X. Only you and your peer can read them.
features.p2p.title: Peer-to-Peer
features.p2p.desc: Direct connections between peers. No server stores your messages or metadata.
features.transport.title: Multi-Transport
features.transport.desc: TCP, UDP/KCP, and relay (WebSocket, TLS). Choose what works for your network.
features.forward.title: Forward Secrecy
features.forward.desc: Ephemeral keys per session. Compromising a long-term key never reveals past conversations.
features.open.title: Open Source
features.open.desc: MIT licensed. Built in Go with transparent, auditable code.
cipher.title: Built on proven cryptography
cipher.subtitle: A hybrid cipher suite combining classical and post-quantum algorithms for defense in depth.
howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps to establish a secure, authenticated channel between two peers.
howItWorks.step1.title: Exchange
howItWorks.step1.desc: HPKE (RFC 9180) establishes an encrypted tunnel using hybrid ML-KEM-768-X25519 key agreement.
howItWorks.step2.title: Handshake
howItWorks.step2.desc: Post-quantum ML-KEM-768 key exchange with mutual challenge-response verification.
howItWorks.step3.title: Communication
howItWorks.step3.desc: Signed, encrypted, and sequenced message frames with replay protection and traffic analysis resistance.
modules.title: Five modules, one protocol
modules.subtitle: A complete toolkit for secure communication, from library to desktop app.
modules.core.title: Core Library
modules.core.desc: Protocol, cipher suite, transport abstraction, session management, and storage.
modules.bus.title: Bus (GUI)
modules.bus.desc: Desktop client with Wails + Svelte. Session management, peer verification, encrypted history.
modules.relay.title: Relay Server
modules.relay.desc: Blind, stateless session switch for NAT traversal. Never sees identities or message content.
modules.tui.title: TUI Client
modules.tui.desc: Terminal client built with Bubble Tea. Direct connection, relay, emoji verification, chat history.
modules.daemon.title: Daemon
modules.daemon.desc: JSON-over-stdio protocol for integrating Kamune with Tauri, Electron, editor plugins, and scripts.
relay.title: Blind relay for NAT traversal
relay.subtitle: A stateless, token-based session switch that bridges encrypted frames between peers without decrypting traffic.
relay.blindDesc: Never sees public keys, identities, or message content.
relay.statelessDesc: No persistent storage, no queues, no offline messages.
relay.zeroMetadataDesc: No social graph, no presence tracking, no persistent identifiers.
relay.transportAgnosticDesc: Same protocol over WebSocket, raw TCP, or TLS.
relay.broker.title: UDP Hole Punching
relay.broker.desc: Optional broker that helps peers discover each other's addresses and punch through NAT — no relay server needed for the data path.
relay.transportTable.title: Transport Comparison
security.title: Defense in depth
security.subtitle: Multiple independent security layers protect your communications.
security.confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
security.confidentiality.desc: All messages encrypted with session-specific keys using ChaCha20-Poly1305X.
security.integrity.title: Integrity
security.integrity.desc: Three layers: AEAD tag, digital signatures, and sequence numbers.
security.auth.title: Authentication
security.auth.desc: Mutual authentication via Ed25519 digital signatures.
security.forward.title: Forward Secrecy
security.forward.desc: Ephemeral ML-KEM keys per session. Past sessions stay private.
security.postQuantum.title: Post-Quantum
security.postQuantum.desc: ML-KEM-768 key exchange resists quantum computer attacks.
security.replay.title: Replay Protection
security.replay.desc: Monotonic sequence numbers detect and reject duplicate messages.
security.traffic.title: Traffic Analysis Resistance
security.traffic.desc: Bucketed random padding makes encrypted traffic harder to analyze.
roadmap.title: What's next
roadmap.subtitle: Kamune is actively developed. Here's where we're headed.
roadmap.item.relay: Relay with TLS and CDN support
quickStart.title: Get started in minutes
quickStart.subtitle: Install and run Kamune in your project.
quickStart.coreDesc: Add Kamune to your Go project
quickStart.relayDesc: Run a relay for NAT traversal
